---
title: Reference
description: Public API for inspect_swe.
reference: inspect_swe
---

## Agents

### claude_code
### codex_cli
### gemini_cli
### opencode
### mini_swe_agent

## Binaries

### download_agent_binary
### cached_agent_binaries
### download_wheels_tarball
### AgentBinary
### SandboxPlatform

## ACP

### interactive_claude_code
### interactive_codex_cli
### interactive_gemini_cli
### bridge_mcp_to_acp
### ACPAgent
### ACPAgentParams
### acp_connection
